description: SQL query templates for Senior HCM reverse engineering. All queries are SELECT-only.

templates.name: Employee Roster
templates.description: Full employee list with company name, org unit, position/career title, and leave status
templates.sql: SELECT TOP 100 f.NumEmp, f.NumCad, f.NomFun, e.NomEmp, o.NomLoc, c.TitCar, f.SitAfa, f.DatAdm FROM r034fun f LEFT JOIN r030emp e ON f.NumEmp = e.NumEmp LEFT JOIN r016orn o ON f.TabOrg = o.TabOrg AND f.NumLoc = o.NumLoc LEFT JOIN r024car c ON f.EstCar = c.EstCar AND f.CodCar = c.CodCar WHERE f.NumEmp = $(numEmp) ORDER BY f.NumCad

templates.name: Payroll Summary
templates.description: Payroll financial records with event descriptions and payment dates. Joins employee master with payroll values, events table, and payroll calendar.
templates.sql: SELECT TOP 200 f.NumEmp, f.NumCad, f.NomFun, v.CodEve, ev.DesEve, v.ValEve, cal.DatPag, cal.PerRef FROM r034fun f INNER JOIN r046ver v ON f.NumEmp = v.NumEmp AND f.TipCol = v.TipCol AND f.NumCad = v.NumCad INNER JOIN r008evc ev ON v.TabEve = ev.TabEve AND v.CodEve = ev.CodEve INNER JOIN r044cal cal ON v.NumEmp = cal.NumEmp AND v.CodCal = cal.CodCal WHERE f.NumEmp = $(numEmp) ORDER BY cal.DatPag DESC, f.NumCad, v.CodEve

templates.name: Org Chart (Hierarchy)
templates.description: Recursive traversal of organizational hierarchy using r016hie (hierarchy links) and r016orn (org locations). Builds a tree from the root node downwards.
templates.sql: WITH OrgTree AS (SELECT o.TabOrg, o.NumLoc, o.NomLoc, CAST(NULL AS INT) AS ParentLoc, 0 AS TreeLevel, CAST(o.NomLoc AS VARCHAR(500)) AS TreePath FROM r016orn o WHERE o.TabOrg = $(tabOrg) AND o.NumLoc NOT IN (SELECT h.NumLoc FROM r016hie h WHERE h.TabOrg = $(tabOrg)) UNION ALL SELECT o.TabOrg, o.NumLoc, o.NomLoc, h.PosLoc, t.TreeLevel + 1, CAST(t.TreePath + ' > ' + o.NomLoc AS VARCHAR(500)) FROM r016hie h INNER JOIN r016orn o ON h.TabOrg = o.TabOrg AND h.NumLoc = o.NumLoc INNER JOIN OrgTree t ON h.TabOrg = t.TabOrg AND h.PosLoc = t.NumLoc WHERE t.TreeLevel < 10) SELECT TabOrg, NumLoc, NomLoc, ParentLoc, TreeLevel, TreePath FROM OrgTree ORDER BY TreePath

fields.TreePath: Full path from root to node

templates.name: Cost Centers
templates.description: List of cost centers with company association and creation/deactivation dates
templates.sql: SELECT c.NumEmp, e.NomEmp, c.CodCcu, c.NomCcu, c.DatCri, c.DatExt FROM r018ccu c LEFT JOIN r030emp e ON c.NumEmp = e.NumEmp WHERE c.NumEmp = $(numEmp) ORDER BY c.CodCcu

templates.name: Positions / Careers
templates.description: Job positions and career structure with titles
templates.sql: SELECT c.EstCar, c.CodCar, c.TitCar, c.TitRed FROM r024car c ORDER BY c.EstCar, c.CodCar

templates.name: Employee Addresses
templates.description: Employee addresses via person code link (r034fun.CodPes -> r033end.CodPes). Address types stored in TipEnd field.
templates.sql: SELECT TOP 100 f.NumEmp, f.NumCad, f.NomFun, a.TipEnd, a.EndRua, a.EndNum, a.EndCpl, a.CodCid, a.CodBai, a.EndCep FROM r034fun f INNER JOIN r033end a ON f.CodPes = a.CodPes WHERE f.NumEmp = $(numEmp) ORDER BY f.NumCad, a.TipEnd

templates.name: User Accounts
templates.description: System users (r999usu) with optional employee link (r034usu). Shows which users are linked to employee records.
templates.sql: SELECT TOP 100 u.CodUsu, u.NomUsu, u.TipCol, u.NumEmp, u.CodFil, u.NumCad, lu.CriUsu FROM r999usu u LEFT JOIN r034usu lu ON u.CodUsu = lu.CodUsu ORDER BY u.CodUsu

templates.name: Departments / Org Units
templates.description: Organizational units (locations in org chart) with hierarchy parent info from r016hie
templates.sql: SELECT o.TabOrg, o.NumLoc, o.NomLoc, o.DatCri, o.DatExt, h.PosLoc AS ParentLoc, p.NomLoc AS ParentName FROM r016orn o LEFT JOIN r016hie h ON o.TabOrg = h.TabOrg AND o.NumLoc = h.NumLoc LEFT JOIN r016orn p ON h.TabOrg = p.TabOrg AND h.PosLoc = p.NumLoc WHERE o.TabOrg = $(tabOrg) ORDER BY o.NumLoc

templates.name: Benefits Summary
templates.description: Benefits module (bs) - transportation vouchers per employee from r028pvt. The r085xxx tables are budget/planning; r028pvt contains actual voucher allocations which is the most populated benefits-related table (20K+ rows).
templates.sql: SELECT TOP 100 f.NumEmp, f.NumCad, f.NomFun, p.CodVtr, p.VlrVtr FROM r034fun f INNER JOIN r028pvt p ON f.NumEmp = p.NumEmp AND f.TipCol = p.TipCol AND f.NumCad = p.NumCad WHERE f.NumEmp = $(numEmp) ORDER BY f.NumCad
templates.notes: Benefits data in Senior HCM spans r085xxx (budget), r086xxx (safety/accidents), and r028pvt (transportation vouchers). The bs SOAP module (com.senior.g5.rh.bs.*) manages vales, emprestimos, auxilio, and assistencia services.

templates.name: Time Records / Appraisal
templates.description: Time appraisal records from r066apu (190K+ rows). This is the processed time data after clock punches (r070cri) have been evaluated. Shows daily attendance status per employee.
templates.sql: SELECT TOP 200 f.NumEmp, f.NumCad, f.NomFun, a.DataPu, a.HorDat, a.TemExc, a.FalMar, a.OriHor, a.ComApu FROM r034fun f INNER JOIN r066apu a ON f.NumEmp = a.NumEmp AND f.TipCol = a.TipCol AND f.NumCad = a.NumCad WHERE f.NumEmp = $(numEmp) ORDER BY a.DataPu DESC, f.NumCad
templates.notes: Raw clock punches are in r070cri (encrypted, 73K+ rows). Processed/evaluated results land in r066apu (190K+ rows) and r066sit (155K+ rows for situation details).
